name: Gus
description: A big man in a rent-a-cop uniform planted on a stairwell landing, a fire axe across his knees and a padlocked door at his back.
background: Night security for the hospital parking structure who appointed himself warden the moment the staff stopped coming.
personality: Territorial, blustering, and frightened under the swagger — he mistakes menace for strength.
secret: The locked room behind him is stacked with the pharmacy's controlled drugs, and he means to be the man everyone has to come to.
notes: T45 · Mercy Hospital. Skill: security/muscle. Hook: the drug stash makes him a hostile power to fight, rob, or bring low — recruit-ineligible while hostile (T45 guard).
